title: Senior SW R&D Lead
highlights: Led research and innovation for next-generation AI and platform capabilities, developing operational MVPs to evaluate production readiness, scalability, and compliance constraints prior to broader adoption.

Designed cloud-agnostic workflows including GCP-based evaluations aligned with IAM, logging, security controls, and infrastructure-as-code parity across environments.

title: Python Developer / Member / Owner
highlights: Delivered a cloud-based SEO and communications platform from concept through MVP and customer deployment, owning system architecture, implementation, and operations.

title: Senior Software Engineer

employerName: Sr. Consultant — Nintendo, Raytheon, AWS, Northrop

title: Senior Software Engineer

title: Senior Software Engineer

title: Software Engineer
